title: Did you ever walk around your house looking for things to fuck?
content:
Did you ever walk around your house looking for things to fuck?
I’m not talking about other humans.
Lets differentiate between men and woman here.
It’s much easier for girls to walk around the house and find things to fuck. For men, it’s a bit harder. Well that depends, of course.
